workshoptitle: Autonomous AI Lakehouse: Unlocking Enterprise Data for AI & Analytics (ODTUG Kscope26)

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Introduction to the Kscope26 Autonomous AI Lakehouse workshop.

tutorials.title: Get Started
tutorials.description: This is the prerequisites for customers using Free Trial and Paid tenancies.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Set up the Workshop Environment
tutorials.description: This lab walks you through the required and optional tasks to set up your workshop environment.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Load Local Data
tutorials.description: Load local files into Oracle Autonomous AI Database for analysis.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Analyze Data with Table AI Assist
tutorials.description: Use Table AI Assist to enrich and prepare data. AI feature steps will be presented as a live demo.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Analyze Data with the Excel Add-in
tutorials.description: Install and use the Autonomous AI Database Excel Add-in. AI feature steps will be presented as a live demo.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving LiveLabs help.
